version.name: 0.35-beta
version.author: Mantrika Sound
version.changelog:
v0.35-beta ChangeLog:
1. Shutdown Process Optimization: Ensures all resources are released correctly. 关闭流程优化，资源正确释放； 2. Render Queue Bug Fixes: Fixed an issue where the user's Default Preset was not applied correctly when constructing multiple queues. 修复多个Queue构造时，没有正确应用用户Default Preset； Fixed abnormal clearing of Region and Mirror caused by GUID changes. 修复region和mirror 因为guid变化导致的异常清空； 3. Auto-Transient Detection: Fixed re-calculation issues caused by floating-point precision truncation of Markers. 自动瞬态检测：修复Marker点的浮点数精度截断导致的重算； 4. Grouping Preference: If the "Grouping" option is enabled in Preferences, it will now be automatically detected and enabled within every project. Preference中如果勾选了Grouping，则会在每一个工程中自动检测并开启； 5. Optimization: Comprehensive performance and security enhancements across the entire codebase. 全代码性能和安全性优化；
-- Mantrika Team --2026-03.16
